title: SUPPLY INTEGRITY (mint/burn entry points)
note: PUBLIC mint/burn, NO access control -> anyone can mint? (supply integrity)

title: SIGNATURE / ecrecover (replay, malleability, no expiry) + ERC-1271 caller-supplied verifier
note: raw ecrecover, file MISSING: nonce (replay), deadline (no expiry)

title: abi.encodePacked HASH-COLLISION (dynamic args)
note: abi.encodePacked(2+ args) in a hash -> verify no two ADJACENT dynamic (string/bytes/array) args (hash collision); use abi.encode if so
